name: VERU INC.
business: Veru Inc. is a late clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel medicines for the treatment of cardiometabolic and inflammatory diseases. Its drug development program consists of two late-stage new chemical entities, enobosarm and sabizabulin. The company sold its FDA-approved commercial product, the FC2 Female Condom, on December 30, 2024, and currently has no commercial revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a late clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel medicines for the treatment of cardiometabolic and inflammatory diseases.

catalysts.sentence: The clinical study is expected to begin in the first quarter of calendar 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Annual revenues for muscle preservation drugs for obesity treatment is expected to reach $30 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Reuters, the annual revenues for muscle preservation drugs for obesity treatment is expected to reach $30 billion.
